2603.09086.title: Latent World Models for Automated Driving: A Unified Taxonomy, Evaluation Framework, and Open Challenges
2603.09086.abstract: Emerging generative world models and vision-language-action (VLA) systems are rapidly reshaping automated driving by enabling scalable simulation, long-horizon forecasting, and capability-rich decision making. Across these directions, latent representations serve as the central computational substrate: they compress high-dimensional multi-sensor observations, enable temporally coherent rollouts, and provide interfaces for planning, reasoning, and controllable generation.
